name: composite-audit and composite-dispatch accept a project id and thread it to enforce-file so a consumer's project-overlay scraped rules are enforced at audit-time and in the tool-absent fallback
command: R="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric"; audit_arg=$(grep -c -- '--project) PROJECT=' "$R/composite-audit.sh"); audit_thread=$(grep -c 'PROJECT.*--project "\$PROJECT"' "$R/composite-audit.sh"); disp_arg=$(grep -c -- '--project) PROJECT=' "$R/composite-dispatch.sh"); disp_thread=$(awk '/native_fallback\(\)/,/^}/' "$R/composite-dispatch.sh" | grep -c -- '--project'); [ "$audit_arg" -ge 1 ] && [ "$audit_thread" -ge 1 ] && [ "$disp_arg" -ge 1 ] && [ "$disp_thread" -ge 1 ] && echo audit-dispatch-thread-project 1>&2
